holdings.infoBox: HAWX is an equity ETF with a total of 124 individual holdings. The top holdings are iShares MSCI ACWI ex U.S. ETF stock at 99.28%, CASH COLLATERAL USD MSILW at 0.20%, EUR/USD at 0.13%, CHF/USD at 0.09%, and CAD/USD at 0.09%.

overview.description: The iShares Currency Hedged MSCI ACWI ex U.S. ETF (HAWX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of global large- and mid-cap stocks outside the US, hedged against movements in the underlying currencies for US investors. HAWX was launched on Jun 29, 2015 and is issued by BlackRock.
